english translation text: Mujrai khalq main, In ankhon nay kya kya dekhaIn the creation made for me, my eyes have seen so muchEnglish Transliteration

urdu transliteration text:
Par kahin sibte payambar sa na aqa dekha
@HujjatELC
english translation text: But they never saw a master such as the Grandson of The Prophet (saw)

urdu transliteration text:
Ja ke Zainab ne Medinay main Kaha Sughra sai, Kahon kis moon say keh Pardes main kya kya dekha
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
When Zainab returned to Madina she said to Sughra (sa),
How do I find the words to tell you what I have seen in the foreign land
When Zainab returned to Madina she said
When Zainab returned to Madina she said

urdu transliteration text:
Maine dekha alam e shah ko aaluda e khoonMaine abbas ko bejaan labe darya dekha
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
I saw the flag of Imam Hussain (a.s) drenched in blood,
I saw Abbas (a.s) lifeless by the river bank
When Zainab returned to Madina she said
When Zainab returned to Madina she said

urdu transliteration text:
Maine dekha ali asghar ka gala khoon may tarMaine zaqmi ali akbar ka kaleja dekha
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
I saw the throat of Ali Asgher (a.s) soaked in blood,
I saw the liver of the injured Ali Akber (a.s)
When Zainab returned to Madina she said
When Zainab returned to Madina she said

urdu transliteration text:
Ek ghatri shahe deen pusht pe laaye usmayMaine tukde huye qasim ka sarapa dekha
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Imam Hussain (a.s) carried a bundle on his back,
Inside I saw the entire body of Qasim (a.s.) in pieces
When Zainab returned to Madina she said
When Zainab returned to Madina she said

When Zainab returned to Madina she said
When Zainab returned to Madina she said

urdu transliteration text:
Hai kyun ho na, gayi kor, ke in aankhon ne    Kaidkhaane mei sakina ka janaza dekha
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Why didn’t my eyes go blind, when I saw the funeral of Sakina in the prison
When Zainab returned to Madina she said
When Zainab returned to Madina she said

urdu transliteration text:
Maine dekha, shahe mazloom ko, khanjar ke tale    Maine neze pe, sar e dilbare, Zahra dekha
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
I saw the oppressed Imam (a.s) under the dagger,
Then I saw the head of son of Syeda Zahra (sa) on a spear
When Zainab returned to Madina she said
When Zainab returned to Madina she said

urdu transliteration text:
Zulm ay mujrai sajjad ne kya kya dekha    Ghar luta qaid huwe baap ka lasha dekha
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
O People! It is so cruel what Imam Sajjad (as) had to witness,
He lost his loved ones, his family members were imprisoned and he saw the body of his father (as.) without shroud
When Zainab returned to Madina she said
When Zainab returned to Madina she said

urdu transliteration text:
Gir pare sibte nabi thaamke haatho se jigarAli Akbar ko jo reti pe tadapta dekha
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The grandson of the Prophet (saw) fell on the ground holding his heart, When he saw Ali Akbar struggling on the plains of Karbala
When Zainab returned to Madina she said
When Zainab returned to Madina she said
